Name: -1_catholic_教_love_カトリック
Representative_Docs:
['it's pretty easy for anyone to say they believe in the teachings of jesus christ. but what is that worth? it's living and practicing those teachings that really mean something. 
actions "speak" louder than words. this country and world would be a far different place if, on a daily basis, we actually put as much time and energy into living in the manner that christ lived as we do in talking and preaching about our belief in him.
was christ a christian? silly question. it's just another word we use to describe something or someone. from what i've read about jesus christ, i think he could care less what you called yourself or someone else. what was important to him (and should be to us) was how we actually live our life.', "i didn't pass the test for civility so the rest of my comment did not fly. i was saying that the hypocrisy behind catholic anti-abortion rhetoric is a moral failing for many catholics. i am pro-life, but have a broader understanding of what that means than to limit it to a fetus. 
          catholic votes got george bush elected and he decimated iraqui civilians waging an illegitimate was based upon fudged data, or lies, to be more correct. trump got elected with the help of the catholic vote because of his anti-abortion stance, and we can see where that got us. if there is a moral crisis, it is partly due to the behavior of catholics in america. 
         i won't let catholics off the hook-the bishops may be late for the bus, but many catholics never knew when the bus arrived. they are out to lunch, serving a bogus conception of redemption based upon obedience to moral law that has nothing to do with grace, salvation, compassion, or, in fact, christianity.", 'you may, as is your wont, throw up a straw man (a non-zero impact is not saying "more harmful," for example).  for my part, i'm merely focusing on inconsistencies in a group's arguments as a scientist, not as a political hack nor a parental-love-starved millennial-seeking-meaning-for-her-life.  i'm also unsure why you see me as a "traditional catholic".  i've certainly never self-identified as such.  i'm simply "catholic."  is the "progressive catholic's" view much different, provided he does the hard work of thinking about the issue?']

Name: 3_trump_white_america_evangelical
Representative_Docs:
['i don't think so - as i said, i was most comfortable with kasich, but voted for cruz given that i wanted to send a message to the party.  trump will cross my line at some point i am sure, but i personally would prefer pence to him any day, but the fact trump chose pence, gives me hope that he may one day change. you seem like a rational person,  albert mohler has a series called "the briefing" i listen to daily and did through the entire election cycle - he gave trump no quarter and openly said he did not see how any evangelical could vote for trump (which i did not),

 i am  however going to honor the office and authority until i cannot any longer, when is that don't know but i am going to cut him some slack, he may learn something about shooting his mouth off. who knows - he has already defied all logic in just winning. if you listened to some of mohlers archives i believe you would gain some more insight and take comfort in knowing there are some rational christians in this country.', 'forget the other candidates.   what about mike pence?    this is a guy who came out of nowhere, and (should trump win) will be a heartbeat away from the presidency.    should trump lose, pence has leapfrogged to the top of the contenders list for 2020.     the term "christian taliban" could be fairly applied to pence - he has extreme social conservative views.

people used to joke that trump was a democratic plant to blow up the gop.     but it's becoming more likely that trump was a tea party plant to make everybody else in the gop (including tea partier's like cruz and pence) look "moderate" by comparison.', "the christians who have cast their lot with donald trump have made a faustian bargain with the devil, and it will surely come back to haunt them. trump is a christian in name only, and the christians who lavished him with their votes and continue to lavish him with their support would realize this if only they would open their eyes and ears to the truth that he's a complete charlatan. but that will never happen in their hermetically-sealed echo chamber. and so they will continue to delude themselves as they willfully cast a blind eye on his abuses of power, his utter disdain for the poor and needy whom jesus championed, his blatant favoritism for his own billionaire class over everyone else, and of course his demonization of everyone who is not white and christian. people who actually read the gospels have no problem figuring out what jesus christ would make of donald trump, which makes me wonder if these trump-supporting christians are reading from a completely different book."]

Name: 4_children_priests_marriage_abuse
Representative_Docs:
["this report is very sad.  the single most important issue facing the catholic church as a whole is the sexual abuse of minors and others by clergy and religious.  if this commission does not come up with a strong set of procedures and rules for every diocese to follow in these cases, it is useless. these procedures should include the removal and excommunication of any bishop who participates in or covers up sexual abuse -- no plum retirement assignments -- they're out and on their own financially and legally.  
if pope francis can't get this done, who can?  and if it can't be done, what's to become of the church?", 'after the boston globe broke the story on priestly sexual abuse in 2002, the american bishops established an independent panel to study this issue. when the national review board released its findings in 2004, noted washington attorney robert s. bennett, who headed the study, said, “there are no doubt many outstanding priests of a homosexual orientation who live chaste, celibate lives, but any evaluation of the causes and context of the current crisis must be cognizant of the fact that more than 80 percent of the abuse at issue was of a homosexual nature.”

furthermore, the panel explicitly said that “we must call attention to the homosexual behavior that characterized the vast majority of the cases of abuse observed in recent decades. . . .”

http://www.catholicleague.org/homosexuality-and-sexual-abuse/', '"the report also rejects the claim that the second vatican council and the sexual revolution were responsible for the outbreak of child sexual abuse, as some have claimed".
(from p.193)
* the impact of the sexual revolution, particularly on psychosexually immature men, whose sexual immaturity and deprivation led to distorted cognitive thinking about children and whose repressed sexual curiosity led to greater sexual experimentation;
* the greater general turbulence in the catholic church during and immediately after the second vatican council, with the celibacy debate masking the deeper crisis about the role of the priest
* ‘young priests unilaterally abandoned the obligation to remain celibate, while some people opted for the priesthood in the expectation it would be abolished’, leading to a conscious rejection of the celibacy rules by many clergy.
much of this relates more to the abuse of adults.
https://eurekastreet.com.au/article.aspx?aeid=52339']

Name: 5_pope_teaching_holy_francis
Representative_Docs:
['jp ii ceased being pope more than ten years ago.  jp ii himself had no power to bind his successors to any particular perspective, whethe it agreed with his own judgment or not.  the same must be said of pope francis, as well as his successors.  there are times when discontinuity in church teaching is necessary and called for, and this is one of those times!', "i don't often agree with life of the lay, but this time i have to agree. when did 'popularity' become a job-description for being the leader of the roman catholic church worldwide? heck,  even the word 'popular' does not properly describe what is expected of popes these days.  instead, it seems that 'successful' popes must have 'rock star' qualities in regard to the size of the crowds they attract (invariably described as a million or more fawning / fainting individuals raising up their babies or doing their best to take a 'selfie' with the pope. 
     but in fairness, the requirement for 'rock star' status didn't begin with pope francis -- it began with pope john paul ii.  yes, i will admit that at first it was exciting to have a pope visiting in the catholic people in their home countries. i, myself went down to grant park in chicago in october 1979 to see jpii in person. but enough of papal visits already -- what counts are the teachings, not how many autographs he can sign!", "the holy spirit selects the pope.
the pope must be listened to.
except i don't like this pope and what he's teaching.
the holy spirit obviously doesn't choose the pope after all."]

に 帰り なさい   太陽 の よう に 明るい   平和 の 教え   平和 の 精神   万物 大 調和 の 心 で ある 日本 の 神 の 教え を 信じ なさい   我々 は 日本人 な の です から   日本 の 平和 な 神 を 信じ ましょ う   罪 など あり ませ ん', 'キリスト 教 の 指導 者 たち は 実は 神 の 存在 を 信じ て い ない 唯物 論 者 だ と で あり 、   また イエス 殺害 の 罪 を かぶせ られ た から で あり ます   だが 、 ユダヤ 教 に 神 が いる の なら ば 、 そういった 災難 から 守っ て あげ なけれ ば なり ませ ん   だが 、 その 願い も むなしく ナチス ドイツ により 無残 に 殺さ れ まし た   そこ に 神 は いる の でしょ う か ？   ユダヤ 教 に 神 は いる Name: 9_testament_knowledge_read_mercy
Representative_Docs:
['the manipulation actually goes further back, to the very origin of the canon. wherein the council of nicea voted on central dogma, as well as which of the thousands of "scriptures" ( the greek word used by paul literally means "anything written") were "authentic". this voting process was contentious and occasionally violent (saint nicholas of myra punched an eighty-year-old bishop named arius in the mouth), and ultimately doctored by the romans, whose intention was to use it for control. that's why the new testament, written by hebrews during their insurrection against rome, says nothing negative about the roman empire.

and yes, the sinai bible, the oldest known version which is kept in the british museum, is quite different from the one fundies today use to shake at us heretics. for instance, "barabbas" (not a name that occurs anywhere else ever) appears as "jesus bar-abbas" (son of god). 

yeah, actually reading that thing cover-to-cover was the beginning of the end for me.', "that's a legitimate question, one theologians have debated for years. an intriguing study if you have that interest.  short answer, we believe god is just & merciful, & while he has not revealed exactly how that would work, there are passages in the bible that indicate he's got that figured out and the plan is fair. we're told that people who lived before christ but believed in the hebrew god (abraham, moses, david) are judged based on what they did with the knowledge they had & were given salvation based on the faith they showed.  we're told that those who were not given specific revelations about god did have knowledge of a higher being & will be judged based on what they did with that.  recorded interactions between hebrews and non-hebrews in the old testament indicate this, & many systems of deities known from secular history also indicate this kind of knowledge.

i'm not trying to convert you :-) just trying to answer your questions.  i wish you well, also.", '"exodus 35:2 "those that work the sabbath should be put to death."
why isn't that happening? "god"....friggin stupid humans and their stories."
=============
you know the bible good enough to refer to a book, chapter and verse....and quote it. good for you. that's a start.
-
the "rest of the story" tells us why (1) you are confused (2) you don't understand.
-
hosea 7:9 "i desire mercy and not sacrifice, and the knowledge of god more than burnt offerings." burnt offerings and sacrifices were never, ever meant to "replace" knowledge of god and mercy. thus your quote of exodus 35:2 shows you have "some knowledge" but "little mercy." 
-
the entire new testament is a testament that the "laws of punishment" has been replaced - replaced - by the "grace of god." it's the continuation of that hosea 7:9 idea.....that god is far more interested in "getting people back to him" than in simply punishing "sinners" with death.
-
you sound like jonah who actually got made when god showed mercy.']

Name: 10_宽恕_基督徒_孩子_自杀
Representation: ['宽恕', '基督徒', '孩子', '自杀', '恶心', '做', '更', '罪人', '死', 'target']
Representative_Docs: ['胡扯 八道 ！ 我们 之所以 信仰 上帝 相信 我们 是 神 的 儿子 耶稣基督 重价 赎回 的 前提 是 我们 承认 自己 是 罪人 ， 每 一个 人 都 是 上帝 创造 的 有神 的 形象 在 人 里面 ， 基督徒 居然 转发 这些 自以为是 的 人 所发 的 诋毁 信仰 的 微博 还 说 人家 说 的 对 实在 让 我 伤心 ， 让 我们 怎么 给 不信 的 人 做 见证 ？ 神爱 罪人 也 爱 不 认识 神 恩典 的 人 基督徒 更要 学习', '@ 迦南 妇人 的 信心   如果 你 真是 基督徒 ， 要 做 的 事 是 为 受害 的 婴儿 与 她 的 家庭 祷告 ， 为 在 永死 和 地狱 的 火 湖前 的 韩磊 灵魂 祷告 ， 而 不是 用 你 诡诈 滴蜜 的 舌 ， 反复 圈呼 诸多 基督徒 来 帮 你 为 这样 一桩 恶行 洗 地 、 甚至 狡狯 地 暗示 孩子 母亲 也 有 错 。 在 中国 ， 真的 什么 都 可以 被 兑现 利用 ? 连 信仰 也 可以 ?', '一个 婴儿 生命 的 丧失 ， 凶手 韩磊 所谓 女友 出来 告白 后 ， n 多 基督徒 著名 知识分子 出来 说 ： ＂ 宽恕 他 吧 。 ＂ 刑不上 大夫 到 了 另 一个 群体 中 就 变成 了 ＂ 刑不上 基督徒 ? ＂ 除了 基督 ， 谁 又 有 赦罪 的 权柄 ? 除了 受害人 ， 谁 又 可妄举 宽恕 的 权力 ? 你们 表现 拥有 ＂ 高贵 的 仁慈 ＂ 时 ， 想一想 失去 孩子 的 母亲 。']

Name: 11_佛教_中国_传教士_传教
Representative_Docs:
['佛教 的 逻辑 基本 是 这样 的 ， “ 你 并 不是 真的 恶毒 、 淫荡 、 吝啬 、 邪恶 ， 你 只是 太蠢 罢了 ， 只要 你 肯用 用 脑子 那 还是 有救 的 ” 。 佛教 真是 一种 从 骨子里 就 高 冷 的 宗教 ， 耶稣 还 可以 跟 撒旦 对 掐 ， 佛祖 大概 只会 摸摸 撒旦 的 头 ， 叹 一句 ： “ 唉 ， 傻 逼 。 ”   不过 远远不如 道教 啊 ， “ 爱信信 ， 不信 滚 ， 不要 打扰 我 飞升 。 “', '支教 老师 就是 儒教 传教士 ， 现代 更是 大力 推送 孔子 学院 
 另外 儒教 主要 是 向 皇帝 诸侯 传教 
 而 道教 则 是 有点 化一说 。 不像 基督教 那样 逮住 一个 传教 一个 ， 而是 看 谁 顺眼 传教 给 谁 。 
 同时 这俩 教 都 与 汉 文化 中原 强 绑定 ， 不太 愿意 向 外族人 传道', '首先 你 要 明白 为什么 要 有 传教士 ， 传教士 的 作用 是 什么 ？ 儒家 不 需要 传教士 ， 从 汉代 官方 就 开始 推广 和 执行 ， 儒家思想 已经 深入人心 了 。 道教 是 有 传教 者 的 。']

Name: 12_信_科学_観_社会
Representation: ['信', '科学', '観', '社会', '絶対', 'あなた', 'カルト', '価値', 'ダメ', '基督徒']
Representative_Docs: ['>> 19   彼ら の 信仰 を 否定 しよ う と は 思い ませ ん が 、 自分 に は そう 見える という 話 です 。   孤立 化 について は 、 キリスト 教 という もの が 本来 の 宗教 と は 別物 で あり 、 社会 が 共有 する 価値 観 として で は なく 、 個人 と 絶対 者 と の 契約 を 履行 する 結果 として の 社会 的 良識 な ので 、   様々 な 派生 物 が 作ら れ 、 結果 として 社会 が 法的 整合 性 を 満たす 限り 何 でも あり な 事 に なる 、 よう に 見える という 話 です 。   そして 、 日本 も その よう に なっ て き て いる という 話 。', '>> 44   ワッチョイ だけ の 問題 でしょ う か ？   あなた が 幸福 の 科学 信者 さん で 、 キリスト 教 スレ を   グノーシス に 塗り替えよ う と し た から です よ 。   あなた は キリスト教 を 乗っ取り 幸福 の 科学 の 支配 下   に 置こ う と し て い ます 。   あなた の 下心 は 見抜い て い ます 。   それで あなた は 最終 的 に この スレ に 来る 信じ やすい   神 の 子 ら 騙し 「 幸福 の 科学 」 即ち   反 キリスト 大川 某 の 教え で 洗脳 し 、 純情 な 神 の 羊 達 を   騙し 、 地獄 に 突き落とそ う と し て いる 。   甘い 言葉 に 騙さ れ ませ ん 。   再び 仏教徒 さん と の 醜い 争い に なる 前 に 此処 を 去っ て   下さい 。 あなた は あなた の 場所 で 信心 さ れる 方 が 幸せ   だ と 思い ます 。', 'キリスト 教 は カルト で ある 。   その 説明 を しよ う 。   本来 、 宗教 と は 任意 の 群れ を 束ねる 共有 さ れ た 価値 観 で あり 、 これ は 群れ と ボス 猿 の 関係 性 を 敷衍 し た もの に 過ぎ ない 。   マトモ な 知性 の 持ち主 なら 理解 頂ける で あろ う 、 この 理屈 は 、 キリスト 教 という カルト が 世界 を 侵食 し た 現代 で は 受け入れ がたい 話 で あろ う 。   何故か ？   キリスト教徒 で は ない 人々 も キリスト教 的 な 価値 観 に 侵食 さ れ て おり 、   某 か の 「 絶対 存在 」 を 無意識 に 頂い て いる 為 だ 。   キリスト 教 的 な 「 宗教 」 や 「 絶対 存在 」 の 否定 を 無意識 に 拒む 為 だ 。   だから 、 人々 は 何事 に も 安易 で 分かり やすい 「 敵対 者 」 を 探す 訳 だ 。   宗教 と は 、 人工 の エセ 神話 や エセ 絶対 者 を 盲信 する もの で は なく 、   本来 は 、 不可解 な 自然 現象 や 死後 を 説明 する 世界 観 で あり 、 その 世界 観 に従って 形成 さ れる 価値 観 そのもの を 意味 する 。   日本 の 場合 、 例えば 太陽 は 天 照 皇 大神 で あり 、 故に 礼拝 する もの で あり 、 我ら を 見守る もの で ある 。   しかし 、 キリスト 教 による 世界 侵略 によって 、 世界 各地 の 宗教 、 文化 が 破壊 さ れ 塗り替え られ た 。   どの よう に ？   個人 主義 とか 能力 主義 とか 見れ ば 判る よう に 、   個人 と 絶対 存在   という 契約 を 無上 と する 、 社会 文化 を 軽視 、 或は 拒絶 する 価値 観 に 塗り替え られ て だ 。   キリスト教徒 側 は こうした 論 を 否定 する が 、   現実 として 、 日本 文化 を 消そ う と し て いる の は 諸兄 も 御 承知 の 事 だろ う 。   また 、 同様 の 事 を 共産 主義 勢力 も し て いる 事 も 。   これ は 、 共産 主義 も キリスト教 文化 から 派生 し た 同質 の カルト で ある 証左 だ と 言える 。   彼ら も また 、 「 共産 主義 による 世界 支配 」 を 夢見る 連中 だ 。   カルト と は 、 反 社会 の 邪教 で ある 。   そして 、 日本 国 は 、 こうした 反 社会 勢力 を 幾つ も 「 宗教 」 と 認可 し 、 税制 優遇 処置 を し て いる 。   世界 的 に 見 て も 、 「 キリスト 教 は カルト だ 」 と は 公式 に 認める 所 は 無い 。   これ が 現状 で ある 。']

Name: 13_immigrants_refugees_country_social
Representative_Docs:
['captain,

by conflating the chaotic mass migration of single men from africa and the near and middle east into europe with the carefully vetted selection of immigrants and refugees (largely families) assisted by an effective settlement network in canada to assist the newcomers adjust to their new country, canada, you do yourself and readers of your comment a great disservice.

there is no indication that this latest wave of new canadians will be more problematic or, over time, not make their own significant positive contribution to canadian society.  your negative reaction mirrors the reactions of other past reactionaries to irish, eastern european, jewish, asian, etc. earlier waves of immigrants.

chill out.', 'regarding; " let us remember that mary, joseph, and the baby jesus were also immigrants in a foreign land when they fled from king herod to egypt. " (bishop eusebio's item on the usccb's blog)
- the bishop reminds us that fleeing means that they were refugees to a country whose border was relatively near to where they were, even by walking. as the story is told, mary, joseph, and jesus returned to their home. the return emphasizes that they were refugees, rather than immigrants, that is ready to make a permanent home in the land of the egypt.
- though the gospel story is mute on this, it would seem that anyone crossing the border had little if any meaning to egypt.
- today, most countries have laws that prevent and or control the entry of peoples. usa is such a country where most permanent immigrants are here according to the law. usa also has legal processes to help entering refugees, and asylum seekers.', 'you missed his words on the vegas attacker. they were swift.

immigration here was always set up to be immigrants who added to our country, skills, lifestyles, whse culture aligned with our american culture and english speaking was a critical role there.

refugees were established for those people who were being persecuted and killed. that included refugees from the middle east-it began with a focus on rescuing christians and bringing them here. i know one such family from iran...but they are not 'white'-

so this " who speak english and are christian" makes sense.']

Name: 14_中国_政府_弾圧_国
Representative_Docs: ['共産 主義 について   キリスト 教 文化 から 生じ た 、 「 思想 」 と さ れる もの だ が 、 これ は 要は 原始 社会 制度 の 上 に 共産 党員 という 特権 階級 を つけ た だけ の 話 を 専門 用語 で 飾り立て た カルト だろ う と 思い ます 。   共産 主義 者 は 理想 と さ れる 社会 の 実現 の 為 なら 、 犯罪 も 正当 化 さ れる という 野蛮 な 信仰 でしょ う 。   或は 「 自 心 は 凡俗 ども より 高等 な 意識 だ 」 という 妄執 でしょ う か 。   この よう な 生態 は 、 キリスト 教徒 が 千 年 王国 に 行く 為 に 蛮行 を 繰返し 、 異教徒 を 人 として 認識 出来 ない の と 同じ でしょ う 。   歴史 的 に 、 現在 で は 共産 主義 勢力 の 自由 経済 社会 へ の 破壊 工作 は 巧妙 化 し 、 合法 の 範囲 で 世論 を 操作 し て い ます 。   表面 化 し てる アカ の 杜撰 さ から 、 こんな 訳 は 無い と 言う 方 も 居る でしょ う が 、 表面 化 し てる の は 末端 だけ だ と 思い ます 。   日本 の アカ 党 も 下部 組織 で しか あり ませ ん 。   蠱毒 の よう な 社会 を 生き抜い た 旧 ソ連 や 中共 の エリート の 連中 と は 別物 でしょ う 。   しかし 、 キリスト 教 と 同様 、 誤っ た 世界 観 、 価値 観 な ので 、 大局 的 に 見れ ば 破滅 に 向かう の は 確か でしょ う 。', '中国 の キリスト教 を 弾圧 し てる 中国 政府 は 反 キリスト   中国 に は 中国 政府 が 公認 し ない 地下 教会 が ある 。', '中国 と 付き合う の は 信仰 的 に も 反し て いる   現代 で も 宗教 弾圧 し てる 中国 。   ローマ に 破門 さ れ てる 中国 カトリック 教会 。   バチカン と 国交 が 無い 中国 。   強制 労働 の 搾取 で 成り立っ てる 中国 経済 。   いつ まで も 過去 に 粘着 する 反日 憎悪 教育 。   中国 を 侵攻 し た こと が ない 周辺 国 へ の 脅迫 。   日本 と 経済 取引 が ある から と いっ て サタン に 属し てる 中国 と 関わる 正当 性 は 無い 。   経済 は 最 重要 で は ない 。 （ 新約 聖書   人 は パン のみ にて 生きる に あら ず ）   強制 労働 の 搾取 で 成り立っ てる 国 と 取引 する の は 人 の 道 に も 反する 。   搾取 さ れ てる 人々 の 立場 で 考えろ 。   悪魔 の よう な 中国 を 擁護 する 怒り の 子 （ 芥子 だ ね ） は 反 キリスト教 。   れい わや 社民党 を 支持 する 怒り の 子 （ 芥子 だ ね ） は 反 キリスト教 。   カトリック 信者 は お前 を 嫌悪 し て いる 。 死ねよ クズ']

Name: 16_women_priests_men_priesthood
Representative_Docs:
["i sincerely hope that in some future century, (if we survive the present political and environmental dangers), the institutional church will be honest enough and brave enough to acknowledge the courage and foresight these pioneering women showed in the earliest stages of breaking down this mysogynistic barrier.  i hope the female pope of that day will lead a universal ritual of apology for the institutional oppression of all women and in particular those women denied consideration of ordination. i hope for equality, the freedom for women to serve as minister and leader, and for women's influence and wisdom in theology and scriptural interpretation.  women's place is not a step behind men's but equal before god in common humanity and in christian baptism.", '"god calls men and women to the priesthood."
if this is true, then the same god calls men and women for pregnancy. do you agree ? what is the difference ? pregnancy is the in born nature of womanhood;  so is male priests to catholics. why to change this ? any pressing need?

instead of such meaning less requests, catholic women should be demanding for holy sacraments like confession to be administered by women. there you have a point..', "um, actually it has everything to do with it.

you see, women exercise motherhood.  pregnancy is the quintessential aspect of being a mother.  it is true that not every women can or will become pregnant.   getting pregnant however is part of the female nature.  it is not part of the male nature.  this is because males exercise fatherhood, not motherhood.

women cannot be priests because of what the priesthood is at it's core: fatherhood.  you will notice that many of the debates about women's ordination are as much about what the priesthood is as who can exercise it.  it is not a coincidence that those who support women's ordination also tend to take a very protestant notion in their theology of ministry.  the idea that ordination isn't a sacrament but just a formal commissioning of someone specially trained in theology to represent and act on behalf of the congregation.  indeed--if that is all the priesthood was, there is no reason women cannot get ordained."]

Name: 17_vote_catholic_abortion_bishops
Representative_Docs:
["i believe you do not understand the standards by which the bishops measure political positions.  donald trump has said he is pro-life.  therefore, he is pro-life and pro-catholic, regardless of his current or past actions, or, for that matter, regardless of whether he actually does or doesn't oppose legal abortion.  what matters is that he is a man and he has paid service to the one issue chosen by the bishops to rally the faithful.  the bishops recognize the inherent veracity of trump because he, like them, is a man, and jesus was a man, as was his father.  it is all very clearly based upon the gospel.  we, as laity, particularly those who have the wrong set of chromosomes (you know who you are), should not worry too much about all this, we should simply follow the leaders.  it's what jesus would want us to do.  just ask your local priest.", '"pope francis had it right when asked -- u.s. voters should ponder and pray and then vote their consciences. by placing so much emphasis on a single issue, by essentially making it obligatory to vote according to a candidate's or party's stance on that one issue, bishops put many catholics in a difficult position as they try to reconcile that issue with the myriad others that have raised themselves this election cycle."

it is intelligent writing like this that has made me an ncr subscriber for decades.  the republican bishops and their fellow shills among the clergy and laity tell us we have to vote "pro-life."  my question is what party is "pro-life?"  the republican party has "pro-life" verbiage in its platform, but when it comes to doing anything to change the law on abortion they do nothing.  in just two years the republicans in the house voted 53 times to overturn obamacare.  how many times did they vote to change the law on abortion?  that's right: zero.', 'of course--same reasons--why would you even ask?

you think i would vote for john kerry---who claims to be catholic yet supports abortion?  i would have had more respect for him if he said "i am pro-abortion.  i know this puts me at odds with the catholic church, but this is who i am.  my political advancement matters more to me than my faith." 

the democratic party platform on moral issues can't be more antithetical to the catholic faith.  what's more, they are, in many ways, now openly hostile to the catholic faith--at least a catholic faith of any substance.

be that as it may. what i said stands: i would vote for a democrat who was pro-life over a republican who is pro-abortion.  that issue is fundamental for me. as i also said: while voting republican is no guarantee of a decent justice, a vote for a democrat is a guarantee for liberal justices.  republican justices often times do not pan out--but democratic appointed justices always pan out for the left.']

Name: 19_schools_school_public_大学
Representative_Docs: ["i have been arguing for a single public system for at least 38 years - as my daughter is 38. but i'm old enough to have gone to swansea public school when there was no catholic school in the area so all children - of all faiths - went to this school. and we learned from each other and supported each other. it works.", 'so the children graduating from catholic schools have actual knowledge that the catholics imaginary supernatural buddy is a fraud and public school grads do not?\n\nprivate schools do better because they can refuse or expel problem students, or ones that require more resources.', 'i was lucky.  i went to a catholic grade and high school.  went i started college i found out i had a leg up on students from public schools.  many of the textbooks in my 1st 2 years were ones i had used in high school.  years latter when i worked with youth, 14 to 18 year olds i was amazed that the youth were in high school but had limited ability to solve simple math problems, poor reading skills and little science knowledge.  the public schools had passed them on.  the question is why?  we know the public schools are failing.  is it the administration or the teachers?  is it the curriculum being taught? is more time spent on social engineering then basic classes?  the big fear is devos will be successful.']

['基督教 之后 ， 欧洲 以及 全球 非常 多次 发生 大规模 瘟疫 ， 每次 都 是 死亡 几千万 到 一亿 。 可以 推论 基督教 给 地球 带来 了 诅咒 ， 非常 邪门 。', '基督教 之前 虽然 也 有 一些 瘟疫 ， 但 死亡 人 数最多 几万 。 基督教 之后 ， 欧洲 以及 全球 非常 多次 发生 大规模 瘟疫 ， 每次 都 是 死亡 几千万 到 一亿 。 可以 推论 基督教 给 地球 带来 了 诅咒 ， 非常 邪门 。', "how so? were the crusades not fought under the banner of the christian church? instigated by the popes?
the very first paragraph in wikipedia's entry for each states: 
1) 'the crusades were a series of religious wars sanctioned by the latin church in the medieval period. the most commonly known are the campaigns in the eastern mediterranean aimed at recovering the holy land from islamic rule but the term crusades is also applied to other church-sanctioned campaigns.'
2) 'the inquisition was a group of institutions within the government system of the catholic church whose aim was to combat heresy.'

['how entirely ironic that i come across this story at the exact same time that i'm listening to "christmas with satan" by james white and the blacks.

if the millennial generation and their peculiar brand of narcissism is any indication, christmas has become a celebration of wearing goofy hats and sweaters.', 'face it, "merry christmas" is one of the most hypocritical phrases in western culture- much like usofa blood-circus coliseum attendees holding their arm over their hearts immediately prior to enjoying the spectacle- the ritual mutual slaughter of rich black men. it is a holiday season and for some it also has religious tinges. it is a season of colossal consumerism, over and self indulgence, not to mention orgiastic pleasuring. for some it is a few days of, at least, recalling the values of inclusion, yes a christian value, but one which also acknowledges other religions, other cultures and the introduction of the other into ours. given that introduction it implicitly recognizes that in their proper times we should know more about, acknowledge and respect others. personally, i'm okay with "happy holidays".
president donald j. trump is an abomination.', 'how curious. i have read a christmas carol every year since 1975, and to this day i am at a loss as to why people believe ebenezer was a "scrooge." the old man repented, born again that christmas morning, and from that day on he was no longer "scrooge." i prefer to think of the old man as the man he was when he died.']

Representative_Docs: ['新教 就是 反 罗马 教廷 而生 的 ， 讲究 一个 因 信称义 ， 生来 就是 去 中心化 的 ， 组织 度 不如 完整 的 教会 不是 很 正常', '新教 的 问题 是 太散 了 。 都 是 分成 了 一个 一个 小 教会 ， 很少 有 大 的 。 因为 新教 就是说 所有人 都 可以 得 上帝 的 天启 ， 所有人 都 可以 成立 单独 的 教会 。 那么 各个 教会 的 组织 能力 就 得 看 组织 宗教 的 人 的 水平 了 。 现在 欧美 那边 教育 水平 下降 的 情况 下 ， 新 冒出来 的 教主 的 水平 也 就 在 跟着 下去 。', '新教 原本 就 怎么 说 呢 ， 就 比较 杂 … 更 主要 是 罗马教会 当年 太 不 做人 ， 尤其 是 整出 了 花钱 上 天堂 这种 烂活 。 \n 新教 的 一大 特色 就是 门槛 低 ， 尤其 是 把 圣经 解释权 给 抢 了 下来 这件 事 几乎 是 正中 罗马 的 命门 ， 但 副作用 也 显而易见 ， 解释权 有点 稀释 过度 了 …']
